mapper.sql: id, application_no, user_id, chinese_name, english_name, gender, birth_date, nationality, email, phone, passport_no, passport_country, passport_expire_date, apply_college, apply_major, degree_level, program_type, education_background, application_status, admission_status, review_opinion, student_profile_id, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.update:
UPDATE admission_application
chinese_name = #{chineseName}, english_name = #{englishName}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, nationality = #{nationality}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, passport_no = #{passportNo}, passport_country = #{passportCountry}, passport_expire_date = #{passportExpireDate}, apply_college = #{applyCollege}, apply_major = #{applyMajor}, degree_level = #{degreeLevel}, program_type = #{programType}, education_background = #{educationBackground}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE admission_application SET application_status = #{applicationStatus}, admission_status = #{admissionStatus}, review_opinion = #{reviewOpinion}, student_profile_id = #{studentProfileId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM admission_application WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM admission_application WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM admission_application WHERE application_no = #{applicationNo} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM admission_application
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
